Property / InterfaceDescriptionFrame Grabber Support
ICogAcq1394DCAMProperties of IEEE 1394 DCAM cameras, such as camera bandwidth.IEEE 1394 DCAM Cameras
ICogAcq1394DCAM
ICogAcqBrightnessThe brightness level of the acquired image.8100L, 8501, 8504
ICogAcqBrightness
ICogAcqContrastThe contrast level of the acquired image.8100L, 8501, 8504
ICogAcqContrast
ICogAcqExposureFor shuttered cameras, the shutter speed. For strobed acquisition, the duration of the strobe.8100L, 8501, 8504
ICogAcqExposure
ICogAcqROIThe region of interest (ROI) that allows you to acquire a subsection of an image.8501, 8504
ICogAcqROI
ICogAcqStrobeControls whether a signal is sent to the strobe output line when an acquisition starts.8501, 8504
ICogAcqStrobe
ICogAcqStrobeDelaySpecifies the delay between the shutter pulse and the strobe pulse.8501, 8504
ICogAcqStrobeDelay
ICogAcqTriggerThe trigger model.8501, 8504
ICogAcqTrigger
